title: Asukas Synch with Damaged Berserk Eva 02
display_title: Asukas Synch with Damaged Berserk Eva 02
wikitext:
[]: Asuka's Synch with (Damaged/Berserk) Eva-02             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Dec 25, 2007 3:28 am In the End of Evangelion, while Eva 02 was deactivated and severely damaged by the Lance of Loginus, the MP Evas tore her torso and several other parts to a bloody mesh. But, while they were tearing it apart, Maya's laptop showed that all of her torso, a bit of her foot, and all of the RIGHT arm was torn. And once Eva 02 had gone berserk, she had LIFTED her RIGHT arm while on Maya's laptop it showed it had been completely lost contact. So, how did Asuka/Eva 02 manage to raise her RIGHT arm while on the computer it had stated that it had lost contact? (Obviously, I don't know how to post a image, so I'm guessing you've all seen EoE.)

[]:             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Dec 25, 2007 3:39 am Simple. Eva-02, temporarily, (and certainly not to the degree of Eva-01 usually does), went beserk.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Dec 25, 2007 7:03 am I meant that, Eva 02's RIGHT arm was destroyed in the surge, so how could it RAISE its RIGHT arm if it was TORN APART?

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Dec 25, 2007 9:19 am I thought that screen was just a nerve/CNS display like the other times we see a similar computer display in the TV series. Would having the nerves severed in your right arm mean it would become useless?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Dec 25, 2007 10:19 am No. Various body parts do not contain nerves, but still function. Or am I just thinking of nociceptors?

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Dec 25, 2007 10:25 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I meant that, Eva 02's RIGHT arm was destroyed in the surge, so how could it RAISE its RIGHT arm if it was TORN APART?

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 25, 2007 10:32 am Indigo Arcangel wrote: Simple. Eva-02, temporarily, (and certainly not to the degree of Eva-01 usually does), went beserk.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 25, 2007 1:21 pm The screen that Maya looks at, doesn't indicate anything has bee torn off: They indicate what parts have been DAMAGED. And eventually, the entirety of Eva-02 has been covered and each of the "Operating Parts" are listed as DAMAGED. This doesn't necessarily mean anything has been torn off. Eva-02's right arm was damaged (and it sure looked damaged) before Asuka starts reaching up towards the sky.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Dec 25, 2007 3:37 pm Nothing was really town apart until the Mass-P Evas came down onto Eva-2 like a bunch of vultures.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 25, 2007 3:51 pm The Imperialist wrote: Nothing was really town apart until the Mass-P Evas came down onto Eva-2 like a bunch of vultures.

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Tue Dec 25, 2007 4:01 pm Oohhh. Sorry, did not read it properly. Well, after they came down, they didn't tore away everything (they, I think, only really tore away the insides). I think it came to pieces after all the grey Lancae Longinae came down, and you know the scene where they are carrying the head? Wel, I think it is that bit that we finally know that they, well, butchered the Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Dec 25, 2007 7:19 pm Ornette wrote:

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Tue Dec 25, 2007 9:32 pm Shit...I feel ashamed of myself for being so ignorant. You guys can explain so easily like the back of your hand. I get it now. The NERVES must've been damaged so that the non-berserker Eva 02 couldn't move it; paralyzed. But of course, with being berserk and everything, you could do anything you wanted to. Also, one more thing, do the MP Evas actually EAT Eva 02, or just like the taste of meat bone? Looked like to me they were eating it, but I wonder where all the flesh goes...imagine they had a digestive system...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 25, 2007 9:42 pm BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Also, one more thing, do the MP Evas actually EAT Eva 02, or just like the taste of meat bone? Looked like to me they were eating it, but I wonder where all the flesh goes...imagine they had a digestive system...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Tue Dec 25, 2007 11:53 pm Zugzwang wrote: Would having the nerves severed in your right arm mean it would become useless?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Dec 26, 2007 7:57 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: Shit...I feel ashamed of myself for being so ignorant. You guys can explain so easily like the back of your hand.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Dec 26, 2007 8:45 am Reichu wrote: Evas have complete digestive tracts.

[]:             Quote Post by TriLink » Wed Dec 26, 2007 3:32 pm BrikHaus wrote: Zugzwang wrote: Would having the nerves severed in your right arm mean it would become useless?

[]:             Quote Post by The Imperialist » Wed Dec 26, 2007 6:27 pm Ursus, was it something called 'Does Eva-0 have jaws?'

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Wed Dec 26, 2007 6:51 pm But, what if any unnecessary products get into the digestive tract and they had to discharge them; can they urinate and expel faeces? Because, the "tail" of the Evas are likely to be covered in armour, and if you were to remove them...would, in Eva 02's case have a...er...um..."tube"? I mean, of course, to have a full digestive tract, you'd need the "things" necessary for the last part.
